title: How should evidence-armed decision packets carry file/callers/similarity?
context: Issue #361 wants a minted create-vs-reuse packet to carry structured evidence (file, last_modified, callers, similarity). But there are TWO packet shapes: the CONTRACT packet written by 'paqad-ai decision create' (src/decisions/authoring.ts, ContractDecisionOption = {option_key,label} only, no evidence field) which is what the pause gate blocks on, and the rich DecisionPacket (src/planning/decision-packet.ts) which already has DecisionOptionEvidence but is only written by DecisionStore/self-arm. Issue #358 hit this and chose prose-in-context with a machine token. AC-1 of #361 asserts 'callers=5, similarity populated', which is awkward to test against prose.

options.label: Add an optional evidence field to ContractDecisionOption, reusing the existing DecisionOptionEvidence type (additive, backward-compatible), and also render it in the context prose
Keep the contract packet shape frozen; carry evidence only as a structured prose block in context, following the #358 precedent

rationale: AC-1 asserts callers=5 and similarity populated; asserting on parsed prose is fragile. DecisionOptionEvidence already exists in decision-packet.ts so extending ContractDecisionOption reuses the canonical type (RULE-13) rather than adding a second evidence representation. Additive optional field is backward-compatible (RULE-23) - existing packets and the pause gate are unaffected.
